strings.string: Highest sustainable power; from a CP test (~FTP+a few %).
Total work capacity above CP, in joules (e.g. 20000).
Share of W-prime assigned to the phosphocreatine tank (0-1).
Max rate the PCr tank can deliver above CP.
Time constant of phosphocreatine recovery (fast, ~22 s).
Time constant of glycolytic recovery (slow, ~360 s).
Below this fraction of CP the glycolytic tank refills (~0.80).
Fraction of recovery energy stored as usable PCr (0-1).
How much low glycolytic reserve slows PCr recovery; 0 disables (~0.75).
Aerobic supply response time toward min(P,CP); 0 = hard CP edge (~25).
How fast glycolysis ramps in at effort onset; PCr covers the first seconds (~6, Parolin 1999).
